summary: Phase 2 testing completed successfully. All profile forms (Candidate 5 sections, Employer 4 sections) and document upload to Emergent Object Storage are working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in profile creation endpoints.
passed_tests: Authentication - Candidate login and session management
Authentication - Employer login and session management
Authentication - Unauthorized access returns 401
Candidate Profile - Section 1 Personal Information (first_name, last_name, country_of_origin, citizenship, phone, etc.)
Candidate Profile - Section 2 Family (father_name, mother_name, children_count, children_ages)
Candidate Profile - Section 3 Professional Experience (current_profession, experience_years, worked_abroad, languages_known, english_level)
Candidate Profile - Section 5 Additional Information (salary_expectation, existing_residence_permit)
Candidate Documents - CV upload to cloud storage
Candidate Documents - Passport upload to cloud storage
Candidate Documents - Criminal record upload to cloud storage
Candidate Documents - Passport photo upload to cloud storage
Candidate Documents - Invalid file type rejection (400 error)
Candidate Profile Submission - Submit for validation workflow (draft -> pending_validation)
Candidate Dashboard - Statistics display (profile_status, documents_count)
Employer Profile - Section 1 Company Information (company_name, company_cui, address, administrator_name, etc.)
Employer Profile - Section 2 Contact Person (contact_person, contact_email, contact_phone)
Employer Profile - Section 4 IGI Eligibility (has_no_debts, has_no_sanctions, has_min_employees, company_age_over_1_year)
Employer Documents - CUI certificate upload to cloud storage
Employer Documents - Administrator ID upload to cloud storage
Employer Documents - Company criminal record upload to cloud storage
Employer Profile Submission - Submit for validation workflow
Employer Dashboard - Statistics display
Access Control - Candidate cannot access employer endpoints (403)
Access Control - Employer cannot access candidate endpoints (403)
Access Control - Unauthenticated users denied access (401)

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating new candidate/employer profiles
bugs_fixed.fix: Added profile_doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one to remove MongoDB _id before returning response

seed_data_creation: Created test candidate and employer users with sessions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 profile forms and document upload fully tested. Candidate profile has 5 sections (Personal, Family, Professional, Documents, Additional). Employer profile has 4 sections (Company, Contact, Documents, IGI Eligibility). Document upload uses Emergent Object Storage. Profile submission workflow changes status from 'draft' to 'pending_validation'. Test users created with email/password auth.

candidate_document_upload.validation: File type validation working (rejects invalid types)

profile_submission_workflow.validation: Checks required fields and documents before submission

access_control.role_based_access: Candidate cannot access employer endpoints and vice versa
